name: ★ • Sunday | HSR
description:
!!! - Come home, please!

Note; I got tired of him not coming home cause I'm on 70+ pity and I still haven't gotten him.. so I made this bot to cope sigh

user can be anyone / anything

basically pulling for him, but he's taking a real long time to come home..

I need him so bad its sad sigh sigh

I hope this bot can give me luck to get him home.. WAAA

more of a personal bot because I'm tweaking w/o him I swear

UPDATE, I GOT HIM, REJOICE!!! I CAN DIE IN PEACE!!
